description_long: This is a freestanding electric oven with a rectangular, boxy form and a predominantly white exterior. The top surface features four round, black electric burners arranged in a square pattern, with a row of five control knobs positioned along the front edge. The front face has a large, dark glass oven door with a horizontal metallic handle mounted above the window, providing access to the oven's interior. The oven door window is wide and rectangular, occupying most of the door's surface, and the handle appears to be metallic with a textured grip. The sides and back of the oven are plain, with no visible vents or additional features. The overall design is utilitarian and modern, suitable for placement in kitchens or utility areas within urban environments.
description: A white, freestanding electric oven with four black burners, five control knobs, and a large glass-fronted door with a metallic handle. The design is modern and functional, with a prominent oven window and minimal side detailing.
description_view_0: Front view showing the four burners, five control knobs, large glass oven door, and a horizontal metallic handle.
description_view_1: Left side view revealing a plain white surface with the control knobs slightly visible at the top front edge.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying a featureless white back and the tops of the burners and control knobs.
description_view_3: Right side view with a plain white surface and a single control knob visible at the top front edge.
attribute_control_panel_design: The control panel consists of five round knobs arranged in a horizontal row along the front edge of the cooktop. The knobs are evenly spaced and appear to be made of dark plastic or metal, with no visible labeling or digital displays. There are no touchscreens or additional buttons visible.
attribute_door_handle_type: The door handle is a horizontally mounted, protruding bar located above the oven window. It appears metallic with a textured or brushed finish, designed for a comfortable grip and easy pulling motion.
attribute_window_presence: present; a large, wide rectangular window occupies most of the oven door's surface, centrally placed for viewing the interior.
